creator: kgalazka@FreeBSD.org
text: Patch was ported from the out-of-tree driver, which uses separate handlers for SIOCADDMULTI and SIOCDELMULTI ioctls, and in iflib it's combined. Maybe this is related, but TBH I see no clear reason why. We started looking into that, but didn't make much progress yet. I'm not a committer, so I can't do it myself, but I'm okay with reverting this patch until we came out with better solution.
